/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/robot-arm.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/robot-arm.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/robot-arm.dir/src/Arm.cpp.o" -o robot-arm  vendor/raylib/raylib/libraylib.a vendor/glm/glm/libglm.a -lpthread /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libGLU.so /usr/lib64/librt.a -lm -ldl -lm /usr/lib64/libSM.so /usr/lib64/libICE.so /usr/lib64/libX11.so /usr/lib64/libXext.so
